name: Church Tax Inquiry and Examination Protections

eligibility.description: Available to organizations claiming to be churches or conventions/associations of churches. Requires the church to monitor IRS compliance with notice and 'high-level official' approval requirements.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Strict procedural requirements limit the IRS's ability to audit churches, including a 2-year completion mandate and a 3-year statute of limitations on assessments (extending to 6 years only in specific cases).
